passwordHint: At least 12 characters; pasting is allowed.
pendingHelp: The administrator must activate this account.
forcedHelp: Replace the one-time password before continuing.
securityHelp: Changing the password closes every session.
usersHelp: Approve accounts and grant minimum access.
tradingMigrationPending: Personal trading rights are locked until robot ownership is migrated.
ownAdminRoleLocked: Your own administrator role cannot be changed here.
activationFailedAfterPermissions: Rights were saved, but activation failed. Retry activation.
sessionsHelp: Review where this account is signed in and close sessions you no longer use.
noOtherSessions: There are no other active sessions.
sessionRevocationWarning: Ending a session immediately signs that browser out and closes its private connections.
dormantLiveTradeHelp: This historical role cannot be granted in the Research / Paper release. Select a supported role to replace it.
reasonHint: Explain why this administrative change is required (3–500 characters).
reasonRequired: Enter a reason of at least 3 characters.
permissionImpact: Changing status or access ends the user’s sessions and may cancel their active work.
adminSessionReason: Explain why these sessions must be ended.
auditHelp: Review recorded account, permission and session changes without opening private user workspaces.
auditNoEvents: No audit events match these filters.
errorSelfDisable: You cannot disable your own account.
errorSelfDemote: You cannot remove your own administrator role.
errorLastAdmin: At least one active administrator must remain.
errorPasswordChangeRequired: Change the temporary password before using administrator actions.
errorUserNotFound: The user no longer exists. Refresh the list.
errorInvalidReason: Enter a clear reason between 3 and 500 characters.
errorStaleUser: This user changed in another administrator session. Refresh and review the current values.
errorLiveRoleForbidden: New live-trading access is unavailable in the Research / Paper release.
errorInvalidCsrf: This form expired. Refresh the session and try again.
errorNotAuthenticated: Your session ended. Sign in again.
errorAuthBusy: Authentication is temporarily busy. Try again shortly.
errorSessionNotFound: This session is already closed or no longer exists. Refresh the list.
errorAdminRequired: Administrator access is no longer available. Refresh your session.
errorInvalidTransition: The account status changed in another administrator session. Refresh and review it again.
errorInvalidRequest: Check the submitted fields and try again.
errorInvalidQuery: The filter is invalid or too long.
errorInvalidPagination: The requested page is invalid. Refresh and try again.
